commands.review_summary:
The PR updates agents-list provider metadata and rendering so configured official external channel plugins that are missing from the runtime still appear with install/doctor repair guidance, plus focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +74, Tests +152. Total +226 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main and v2026.6.9 build agents-list provider metadata only from read-only loaded channel plugins and skip unresolved binding channels, so an ownerless configured external channel can disappear from the listing.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is queued because the current head is mechanically clean; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and merge gating.

target.title: fix(agents): keep missing external channel providers in agents list
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running `openclaw agents list` with a configured external channel plugin that is not installed in the current runtime would not see that provider row or its recovery guidance.

## Why This Change Was Made

This keeps provider rows and routing summaries visible even when runtime registry normalization is unavailable for a configured external channel id, so the CLI can still show the missing-plugin repair hint. The change stays scoped to provider/routing summary resolution and adds focused regression coverage for that path.

## User Impact

Users now see the configured provider entry and the missing-plugin installation guidance instead of a silently omitted provider row.

## Evidence

Real packaged-runtime proof on macOS using `openclaw-2026.6.8.tgz` installed into a fresh temp project.

Commands run:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.providers.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.commands.list.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `npm install /Users/shen/Documents/GitHub/openclaw/openclaw-2026.6.8.tgz`
- `HOME="$PWD" npx openclaw agents list`

After-fix output included:

```text
Routing: Feishu default
Providers:
  - Feishu default: missing plugin - Install the official external plugin with: openclaw plugins install @openclaw/feishu, or run: openclaw doctor --fix.


More detail：
shen@shendeMac-mini openclaw-pr-95266-proof % npm install /Users/shen/Documents/GitHub/openclaw/openclaw-*.tgz
npm warn EBADENGINE Unsupported engine {
npm warn EBADENGINE   package: 'hosted-git-info@10.1.1',
npm warn EBADENGINE   required: { node: '^22.22.2 || ^24.15.0 || >=26.0.0' },
npm warn EBADENGINE   current: { node: 'v22.22.0', npm: '10.9.4' }
npm warn EBADENGINE }
npm warn deprecated node-domexception@1.0.0: Use your platform's native DOMException instead

added 298 packages in 20s

67 packages are looking for funding
  run `npm fund` for details
shen@shendeMac-mini openclaw-pr-95266-proof % mkdir -p .openclaw
shen@shendeMac-mini openclaw-pr-95266-proof % cat > .openclaw/openclaw.json <<'EOF'
shen@shendeMac-mini openclaw-pr-95266-proof % pwd
/tmp/openclaw-pr-95266-proof
shen@shendeMac-mini openclaw-pr-95266-proof % HOME="$PWD" npx openclaw agents list

🦞 OpenClaw 2026.6.8 (fbcee43) — The lobster in your shell. 🦞

Agents:
- main (default)
  Workspace: ~/.openclaw/workspace
  Agent dir: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent
  Routing rules: 1
  Routing: Feishu default
  Providers:
    - Feishu default: missing plugin - Install the official external plugin with: openclaw plugins install @openclaw/feishu, or run: openclaw doctor --fix.
Routing rules map channel/account/peer to an agent. Use --bindings for full rules.
Channel status reflects local config/creds. For live health: openclaw channels status --probe.
